action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of 2 ConvNeXts (best.pt + cnxt2.pt) got new best 0.7986. Analysis: Adding more diverse ConvNeXt models should help. Each run ~3.5 min. With 4.6h left, I can do 3-4 more training runs. Let me train cnxt3 with different seed (and maybe a different recipe) and add to ensemble. Decision: Train cnxt3.pt with seed=456 and 5 epochs, then eval ensemble of 3.
